response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and tooling experience, but the role requires a Level II Engineering Manager with 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of formal technical leadership. The resume shows no direct people-management experience, no mobile-platform ecosystem work, and limited evidence of developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure ownership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: 13+ years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrated developer-tooling instincts: built a D test runner (Trial), assertion library, CI/CD setup, and AI-agent/MCP tooling
Active community teacher — Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, workshops — signals mentoring ability
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report experience listed; role requires 2+ years managing people
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem exposure (brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016 only)
Developer-tools work is mostly personal/OSS rather than leading an Engineering Productivity org with build systems and test infrastructure at scale

key_factors.factor: Strong technical depth and developer-tooling background
